Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to try the new burger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It had a strange texture, but[n]tasted surprisingly good...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Along with some soggy Duck Fries,[n]I devoured the mysterious burger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A staffer looked apologetically[n]at me before turning away...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With some uneasiness, I managed[n]to finish the whole thing...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to try the Weekend Wilduck Set...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There was more than I expected, but[n]I managed to finish everything...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The taste was indescribable, but I[n]somehow finished the whole thing...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It had a strange, perplexing[n]taste, but I finished it anyway...![n]{f 1 1}
